2604.13812.title: AlphaCNOT: Learning CNOT Minimization with Model-Based Planning
2604.13812.paper_summary: Quantum circuit optimization is a central task in Quantum Computing, as current Noisy Intermediate Scale Quantum devices suffer from error propagation that often scales with the number of operations. Among quantum operations, the CNOT gate is of fundamental importance, being the only 2-qubit gate in the universal Clifford+T set. The problem of CNOT gates minimization has been addressed by heuristic algorithms such as the well-known Patel-Markov-Hayes (PMH) for linear reversible synthesis (i.e., CNOT minimization with no topological constraints), and more recently by Reinforcement Learning (RL) based strategies in the more complex case of topology-aware synthesis, where each CNOT can act on a subset of all qubits pairs. In this work we introduce AlphaCNOT, a RL framework based on Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) that address effectively the CNOT minimization problem by modeling it as a planning problem. In contrast to other RL- based solution, our method is model-based, i.e. it can leverage lookahead search to evaluate future trajectories, thus finding more efficient sequences of CNOTs. Our method achieves a reduction of up to 32% in CNOT gate count compared to PMH baseline on linear reversible synthesis, while in the constraint version we report a consistent gate count reduction on a variety of topologies with up to 8 qubits, with respect to state-of-the-art RL-based solutions. Our results suggest the combination of RL with search-based strategies can be applied to different circuit optimization tasks, such as Clifford minimization, thus fostering the transition toward the "quantum utility" era.
2604.13812.paper_summary_zh: 量子電路優化是量子計算中的一項核心任務，因為當前的噪聲中間規模量子設備受到錯誤傳播的影響，這種影響通常會隨著操作數量的增加而增強。<lb/>在量子操作中，CNOT 閘具有基本的重要性，它是通用的 Clifford+T 集合中唯一的 2 量子位閘。<lb/>CNOT 閘的最小化問題已通過啟發式算法進行了探討，例如著名的 Patel-Markov-Hayes (PMH) 用於線性可逆合成（即，無拓撲約束的 CNOT 最小化），以及最近通過基於強化學習 (RL) 的策略在更複雜的拓撲感知合成情況下進行了探討，在這種情況下，每個 CNOT 可以作用於所有量子位對的一個子集。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們介紹了 AlphaCNOT，一個基於蒙特卡羅樹搜索 (MCTS) 的 RL 框架，有效地解決了 CNOT 最小化問題，將其建模為規劃問題。<lb/>與其他基於 RL 的解決方案相比，我們的方法是基於模型的，即它可以利用前瞻搜索來評估未來的軌跡，從而找到更高效的 CNOT 序列。<lb/>我們的方法在與 PMH 基準的線性可逆合成中實現了最多 32% 的 CNOT 閘數量減少，而在約束版本中，我們報告了在多種拓撲下，對於最多 8 量子位的情況下，閘數量的穩定減少，相較於最先進的基於 RL 的解決方案。<lb/>我們的結果表明，將 RL 與基於搜索的策略結合可以應用於不同的電路優化任務，例如 Clifford 最小化，從而促進向「量子實用性」時代的過渡。
2604.13812.author: Jacopo Cossio et.al.
2604.13812.authors: Jacopo Cossio, Daniele Lizzio Bosco, Riccardo Romanello, Giuseppe Serra, Carla Piazza
